title: Oxydectes trigonocarpa
intro: Oxydectes trigonocarpa, also known as the trigonocarpous tree, is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The health benefits of Oxydectes trigonocarpa include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing pain, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Oxydectes trigonocarpa are teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
